question:
Will Anyone’s Legend win LoL Worlds 2025?

Description: This market will resolve according to the esports team winning 1st place in the League of Legends 2025 Season World Championship (Worlds 2025).

If the winner of the World Cup 2025 is not determined by December 31, 2025 ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Liquipedia: https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

evidences.title: AI Predictions for Worlds 2025: Who Will Win the LoL Championship? | Esports Charts
evidences.content: Faker with fans / Photo: Riot Games According to the AI, Gen.G has the strongest chance of winning the 2025 World Championship. The reasoning is clear: the team has dominated the current LCK season and already claimed two major international titles — the Mid-Season Invitational 2025 and the Esports World Cup 2025. The second major contender is Bilibili Gaming, which secured its spot among the top three after winning the LPL Split 3 2025. Since this year’s World Championship is taking place in China, all the AI models agreed that the home-field advantage could give Bilibili Gaming an important morale boost. evidences.title: My Final Lol Esports Power Rankings 2025
evidences.content: games played in the year were played domestically in the playoffs. That's what that first number indicates next to the team name. Games played in the playoffs. The number next to it, whether it's blue or red, is playoff win rate. And then the next numbers, if there are some, is international percentage of games played in international win rate. So, Gen G, 47% of their games this season were played either in the playoffs in the LCK or played uh internationally, resulting in 60 and 64% win rates. And then you say to yourself, well, what does that separate them from anyone's legend? 27 22. Well, what do you do in the other 50% of games? Not to mention, this is just the win rate portion. All the um kill stats, tower stats, objective stats, those also played as much of a role. But I feel like [...] pays the bills, but this game changes every two weeks. So to think that a team was better than everybody else because they were good on a one on one patch of 20, like get the [ __ ] out of here. That's ridiculous. So T1 over the entirety of the season I have is fifth. Um, but KT eighth and then after that you end up with JDG, Waybo, D+, NIP. I mean, all these teams were kind of meh, right?...

evidences.title: LoL Esports | Worlds Standings
evidences.content: ## Worlds Standings Oct – Nov ##### Worlds overview The top teams from the season come together for the final tournament of the year. The winner is crowned the best team in the world. 1st Place ###### 1st Place Winner of the 2025 League of Legends Esports season ##### Event Phases The top teams from the season come together for the final tournament of the year. The winner is crowned the best team in the world. ###### Play-In The 4th seed of the regions that obtained an additional slot from MSI will compete in the Play-in stage. The Play-In stage is 1 single elimination best of 5 that qualifies 1 teams into Swiss Stage. ###### Swiss 16 teams comes together to play in a 5 round Swiss format. The 8 teams with 3 wins at the end of round 5 will advance to the Knockout stage. [...] ###### Knockout 8 teams compete in a single elimination bracket to crown the winner of the 2025 season. ##### Qualifying Teams The following teams have qualified CBLOLCBLOL VKS VKS LCSLCS FLY FLY LECLEC G2 G2 MKOI MKOI FNC FNC LCPLCP CFO CFO PSG PSG TSW TSW LCKLCK KT KT HLE HLE GEN GEN T1 T1 LPLLPL LTA NorthLTA North Riot Games League of Legends © 2026 Riot Games. evidences.content: Here’s everything you need to know! Worlds has three stages: the Play-In Stage (October 14), the Swiss Stage (October 15-25) and the Knockout Stage (October 28-November 9). Play-In Stage (Bo5) - Beijing(All matches begin at 4 p.m. CST / 10 a.m. CET / 1 a.m. PT unless otherwise noted) Tuesday, October 14 Swiss Stage (Bo1, Bo3) - Beijing (All matches begin at 4 p.m. CST / 10 a.m. CET / 1 a.m. PT unless otherwise noted) Wednesday, October 15 - 1 p.m. CST / 7 a.m. CET / 10 p.m. PT Oct. 14 Thursday, October 16 - 1 p.m. CST / 7 a.m. CET / 10 p.m. PT Oct. 15 Friday, October 17 Saturday, October 18 Sunday, October 19 Wednesday, October 22 Thursday, October 23 Friday, October 24 Saturday, October 25 - 1 p.m. CST / 7 a.m. CET / 10 p.m. PT Oct. 24 [...] By joining a Faction, fans declare allegiance to their favorite creator and earn points as Worlds 2025 progresses. At the end of the tournament, the Faction with the highest average score wins an exclusive Emote for every participant! Get your Faction picks lined up because this Emote is not available anywhere else. Format Updates: With a condensed Worlds 2025 schedule, we’ve adjusted the Pick’Ems cadence to keep the experience competitive:...

evidences.title: LoL Esports |
evidences.content: Worlds 2025 begins with 17 teams vying for the trophy. The Play-In Stage will kick off October 14 in Beijing at the state-of-the-art Beijing Smart Esports Center, a venue built specifically for premier esports events. This will be the first time the Beijing Smart Esports Center hosts a World Championship, and it promises to deliver an electric atmosphere. New this year, the Play-In Stage will host a one-day best of five between the fourth seeded team of the two best performing regions from MSI to punch their ticket to the Swiss Stage. From October 15-25, the Swiss Stage will bring together 16 teams from across the globe in a dynamic format, where every win moves you closer to knockout contention—and every loss brings you closer to elimination. [...] Riot Games League of Legends © 2026 Riot Games. All Rights Reserved. Privacy NoticeTerms of ServiceAccessibility The 2025 League of Legends World Championship is heading back to China and will take place from October 14 to November 9. Fans around the world can look forward to world-class competition, unforgettable moments, and the crowning of the next World Champion. ### Play-In and Swiss Stages – Beijing Smart Esports Center, Beijin...

raw_response_meta.query: Will Anyone’s Legend win LoL Worlds 2025? Description: This market will resolve according to the esports team winning 1st place in the League of Legends 2025 Season World Championship (Worlds 2025). If the winner of the World Cup 2025 is not determined by December 31, 2025 ET, this market will resolve to "Other". The resolution source for this market will be official information from Liquipedia...
